decisions.why: Matches the alias convention configured in vite.config.ts and used by ScrollReveal's own internal imports (e.g., @/hooks/useReducedMotion)

decisions.what: Used framer-motion to animate background glow opacity in a loop for the subtle pulse
decisions.why: Specification requested 'animate with subtle pulse' on the absolute gradient/blur background div

decisions.what: Truncated wallet address using first 6 + last 4 characters via a small local helper
decisions.why: Matches the wallet-address truncation format requested in the specification

decisions.what: Conditionally rendered chain name only when chain?.name is defined
decisions.why: wagmi's useAccount returns chain as potentially undefined under strict null-checks
